name: article-to-video
description: Article or document to marketing/explainer video: markdown outline, HTML slides, screenshots, MiniMax TTS, SRT, ffmpeg MP4. Paths under <cwd>/media/. CLI: npm run video -- …

article.description: Source article or notes; workflow also supports local files and URLs per SKILL.md.

videoPath.description: Absolute or project-relative path to the final MP4, e.g. media/outbound/<task-id>.mp4.

videoUrl.description: Optional: URL if the same file is hosted; local-only runs may omit.

output.description: Primary artifact is a local MP4 path under media/outbound/.
